prompt:
A sponge filter back in action inside an aquarium: a clean black sponge cylinder with a central uplift tube releasing a steady, even stream of fine bubbles. The scene emphasizes uniform bubbling and good flow—bubbles rising straight up, gentle surface agitation, and a tidy airline connection routed along the tank edge to an air valve.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future home-aquaria aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic bubbles and water refraction, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the sponge filter centered and visually clear as “working and restored.”
